description: To clean up the ad account, a manager needs to archive all campaigns that ended more than a year ago.

nodes.task_description: Filter the list of all campaigns to show only those with an end date more than 365 days in the past.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of old, completed campaigns.

nodes.task_description: Select all the campaigns in the filtered list.

expected_outcome.value: Agent highlights all the correct campaigns.

nodes.task_description: Change the status of the selected campaigns to 'Archived'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully archives the old campaigns, hiding them from the default view.
